name: undercity-root
description: A browser-based crime MMO. Build your criminal empire, commit crimes, train stats, dominate the underground.

scripts.test: npm --prefix backend run test && npm --prefix frontend run test && npm --prefix backend run test:integration
scripts.test:coverage: npm --prefix backend run test:coverage && npm --prefix frontend run test:coverage
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix backend run lint && npm --prefix frontend run lint
scripts.lint:fix: npm --prefix backend run lint:fix && npm --prefix frontend run lint:fix
